content: Backend: Emitir progress intermedios (6%, 8%, 10%, 12%) durante discover/hydrate + logs estructurados
Backend: asyncio.wait_for hard-timeout (90s) en discover_priority_fixtures + hydration; fail-soft a global pool
Backend: Formalizar fail-soft de compute_pressure_score con available=false cuando stats vacíos
Frontend: Detección de stall (>60s sin cambio en progress) en AnalysisProgressModal + botón reintentar
Tests: pressure score vacío + stall detection + regression LiveReevalPanel
Restart backend + run pytest suite + report
